title: Add passwordHash field to User model with bcrypt hashing
description: Add a `passwordHash` field to the existing Users collection and create a password hashing utility using bcrypt (or argon2). This involves: (1) adding the `passwordHash` field to `src/collections/Users.ts`, (2) creating a password hashing utility in `src/utils/` with hash and verify functions, (3) adding a database migration to create the column, and (4) writing unit tests for the hashing utility and model validation. The existing Users collection uses Payload auth with `hash`/`salt` fields; this adds a dedicated `passwordHash` field as the foundation for future JWT auth tasks.
existing_patterns: src/collections/Users.ts - Payload collection config with auth enabled, fields array, access controls
src/auth/user-store.ts - password hashing pattern with salt generation using crypto.randomBytes
src/migrations/20260405_000000_add_users_permissions_lastLogin.ts - migration using sql ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN
src/utils/*.ts - single-function utility files with co-located .test.ts files
